title: Opening for Medical Officer at Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises:
Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises!
